findings.evidence: `rg -n "lemma isJHolomorphic.*prod_iff" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/JHolomorphicProd.lean` shows the lemmas at lines 154, 166, 178, and 191 with no preceding `@[simp]`; existing normal-form API such as `isJHolomorphicOn_univ` is marked `@[simp]` in `JHolomorphic.lean:111`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to these iff lemmas so `simp` reduces holomorphicity into a direct-sum target to the two coordinate predicates.
findings.issue: The four coordinatewise characterization lemmas `isJHolomorphicAt_prod_iff`, `isJHolomorphicWithinAt_prod_iff`, `isJHolomorphicOn_prod_iff`, and `isJHolomorphic_prod_iff` are characteristic normal forms but have no `@[simp]` annotation.

summary: The product-target characteristic API is present, but its normal-form iff lemmas are not exposed to automation, so downstream users still have to name them manually instead of using the advertised product API through `simp`.
